name: Hamburger Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups chopped Cheddar or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a skillet and drain any excess fat, then set aside.
2. In a bowl, blend together the mayonnaise, milk, eggs, and cornstarch until smooth.
3. Stir in the cooked meat, cheese, onion, and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes, or until set.
